sentiment.summary: Markets in a fragile holding pattern as US-Iran ceasefire tensions resurface and oil climbs back toward $97.

insights.text: Ceasefire relief stalls as Iran violations rattle confidence. S&P 500 nearly flat, DOW slipped 0.6%. Trump accused Iran of poorly reopening the Strait of Hormuz, pushing oil higher. Sentiment-driven rally is fragile — underlying fundamentals unchanged. Trade with caution.

BTC at $71,787 — just below your $73,135 cost basis. Up 1.3% today and 7.9% on the week, riding geopolitical relief. A clean break above $73K returns you to profit. Iran-driven macro volatility is the key risk. Hold; no urgency to add or cut.

Rocket Lab raises $474M and accelerates its roadmap. Completed at-the-market equity offering, 85th flight (ESA launch), Citizens upgrade to Outperform, and Mynaric acquisition closing this month. Dilution from 6.7M new shares is real, but war chest now loaded for growth.

EchoStar at $128.80 — 12.6% above your $114.33 cost. SpaceX spectrum sale (~$17B), FCC satellite spectrum reform tailwind, and debt restructuring in motion. Sling Essentials adds revenue diversification. Regulatory timeline remains the primary risk.

T1 Energy volatile but analyst PT of $7.83 supports your ~$6.73 cost. Q4 miss dropped stock 6.7% on Apr 2 then bounced 8.4% by Apr 10. Norway industrial site allocation adds short-term uncertainty. Moderate Buy consensus across 7 analysts. Hold and watch.

Seagate on a tear — 39% gain in 8 days, near all-time highs at $501. Well above your $448.98 cost. Morgan Stanley named STX top pick with $582 PT. AI data center HDD demand creating shortages extending through 2028. Consider a trailing stop to lock in gains.

Telesat at $43.15, up 29% from your $33.33 cost. Northwestel Lightspeed LEO deal signed; first satellites launch late 2026. 52-week high of $46.65 is within reach. Full commercial service now delayed to Q1 2028 — watch for further timeline slippage.

BigBear.ai at $3.49 — down 61% from your $9.02 cost. Revenue fell 37.7% YoY on Army contract disruptions. H.C. Wainwright and Cantor both cut PTs to $6/$5 (neutral). Recapitalization clears 90% of debt but dilution hurts. Full rebuild story — hold only if conviction remains.

Nebius at $145.19, above your $131.12 cost and surging. $27B Meta AI deal plus $19.4B Microsoft compute contract are transformational. AI21 Labs acquisition talks add optionality. Capacity scaling from 170 MW to 800 MW–1 GW by end of 2026 — top AI infrastructure play.

Oklo at ~$48.65 — down 61% from your $125.00 cost. NRC and DoE approvals landed but stock fell 20% post-announcement. Revenue not expected until 2027–2028. Down 70% from 2025 highs. Wall Street PT $101.54 implies big upside if it executes — pure speculation, long hold required.

Navitas popped 8.5% at NVIDIA GTC then profit-taking hit. 800V-to-6V AI power board is genuinely disruptive but sentiment cooled. Price near $11.59, slightly above your $10.00 cost. Analyst Hold consensus; CFO transition adds uncertainty. AI power delivery thesis intact — hold.
